_meta.source: humulos /dmx (V1 XA/XB) + /dmx/2 (V2 XC/XD) + /dmx/3 (XE/XF chart-parsed + Kera); wayland sprites+timers
_meta.complete: ALL versions captured. V1/V2/Kera from markdown; V3 XE/XF edges parsed deterministically from the humulos chart HTML (corpus/db/parse_dmx3_chart.py -> evo_v3_edges.json). Stages for pure-V3 mons inferred by propagating along the edge graph. GAPS: attributes null for pure-V3 mons (chart has no attribute data -> backfill from wikimon/DVPet); 3 orphan sprites with no extracted edge (v3_pending).
_meta.condition_fields: care_mistakes, effort, level, area_cleared[], area_not_cleared[], defeat_stage6, cumulative_battles, special_encounter, sub_version (XA-XF), time_min, alternatives[]
